[[File:Blisterwood_flail_detail.png|left|184x184px]]
The '''blisterwood flail''' is a one-handed melee weapon created during the [[Sins of the Father]] quest by combining a [[blisterwood sickle]] with the [[Ivandis flail]]. Should the flail be lost before quest completion, it can be reclaimed from [[Veliaf Hurtz]] in the Icyene Graveyard for 40,000 gp. After quest completion, it is sold by [[Ivan's Supplies|Ivan Strom]] in Meiyerditch. 

This flail requires an [[Attack]] level of 50 to wield, and gives a 25% damage and 5% accuracy bonus against [[vampyre]]s.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ed|url=https://twitter.com/JagexEd/status/1269923331890872326|date=8 June 2020|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/101591|archivedate=8 June 2020|quote=25% bonus damage (compared to 20% for the Ivandis Flail) and 5% bonus accuracy.}} Though it can [[autocast]] spells, it is outclassed as a high-prayer bonus magic weapon by any [[crozier]], and no spells are capable of dealing damage to vampyres.

The flail is also effective in damaging the [[vyrewatch]], and the only weapon able to damage [[Vyrewatch Sentinel|vyrewatch sentinels]], due to the flail being incredibly unpredictable and random, which allows the player to circumvent the vyrewatch's ability to see into the very near future, and thus dodge regular weapon attacks. The blisterwood further enhances the flail due to the bark continuing to grow unpredictably even after the logs are processed, in addition to the sap being poisonous to vampyres.

The blisterwood flail retains the ability to cast [[Bloom]] from the [[Ivandis flail]] and any of the blessed [[sickle]] varieties used to create the [[Blisterwood sickle]]. This multiplicity of use lets a player kill [[ghasts]], [[vampyre juvinates]], and [[vyrewatch]] with a single weapon, making it highly useful for [[Temple Trekking]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Retainer (flail).gif|thumb|220px|A player performs the blisterwood flail's special attack, ''Retainer''.]]
The blisterwood flail retains the [[Ivandis flail]]'s special attack, ''Retainer'', which traps a [[vampyre juvenile]] or [[vampyre juvinate|juvinate]] that has less than 50% hitpoints remaining, preventing it from retaliating for 30 seconds. This consumes 10% of the player's special attack energy.

Even if the attack fails to activate, stating either {{mes|This spell can only be used on vampyre juveniles or vampyre juvinates.}} or {{mes|This spell only works against vampyres with less than half of their health remaining.}}, it will still incur the normal attack delay, so take care not to accidentally use it in those circumstances.

==Treasure Trails==
{{FaloItem|Blisterwood flail|Vampyres are agile opponents, damaged best with a weapon of many components.}} Alternatively, a [[Rod of ivandis]] or [[Ivandis flail]] can be used.
